title: Safety Tips
description:
Follow McFumbDuck in his journey throught hazardous situations!

-------------------

I couldn't find a lot of time to work on my personal animations in the last two months, being quite busy with other things... ...but I've manage to pull out some commissioned shorts for a safe-at-work campaign! Here is one of those shorts!...

...with some added flavour just for you, my beloved YouTuber fellow! ;*

...the character's name is one of those fyi!
